_comment: Run batches the dashboard offers at Start. Each maps to a models file (one ollama tag per line, '#' comments allowed). 'dryrun' is the 2-model end-to-end validation; 'full' is the whole locked roster. Add more batches here (e.g. a single-bracket subset) and they appear in the UI automatically.

batches.label: Full roster — all models
batches.desc: The complete locked roster. The real run (~days, judged 8-wide).
